channel.title: ARX — Market Insights & Trading Analysis
channel.description: Insights on DeFi copy trading, market regime detection, wallet intelligence, and Hyperliquid. Stay ahead with ARX.

item.title: BTC Bears Added $120M in Fresh Shorts at $78K — HYPE Squeeze Confirmed
item.description: HYPE called: funding flipped from −30.3% APR to +10.95% APR in six hours — shorts squeezed out as price recovered from $40.24 to $41.08. BTC shorts answered by adding $120M in new open interest: OI grew from $2.02B (06:04 UTC) to $2.14B at 12:43 UTC, while funding held at −9.35% APR (per

item.title: BTC Shorts Pay 6× More to Stay Short at $78K — ETH and SOL Flip Net Long as Bears Concentrate in BTC
item.description: BTC perp shorts added into yesterday's $2K recovery — and the carry cost they pay jumped 6× overnight, from −1.59% APR (yesterday 06:01 UTC) to −9.68% APR on $2.02B in open interest (the total value of all active positions). BTC perpetual funding (the fee shorts pay longs each hour

item.title: $1.97B BTC Perp Shorts Unmoved as Oil's War Premium Fades — Wednesday Ceasefire Is the Binary
item.description: Iran sent a delegation to Pakistan talks ahead of Wednesday's ceasefire deadline. BTC: $75,794 (+2.1%). Oil's war premium is already reversing — WTI fell back after Monday's 7% spike on “mixed messaging.”

item.title: The Complete Guide to Gold Perps on Hyperliquid (2026)
item.description: The complete 2026 guide to trading gold perps on Hyperliquid. Contract specs, funding, 5 strategies, risk management, and full onboarding walkthrough.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz Under Attack — Oil Surges as DeFi Loses $292M in the Year's Biggest Hack
item.description: Two shocks hit overnight. Iran and the U.S. attacked commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz — oil surged and S&P 500 futures reversed from record highs. Separately, 2026's largest DeFi exploit drained $292M from cross-chain protocols (bridges that move assets between blockchains), triggering a &ld

item.title: S&P 500 Breaks 7,000 on Earnings. Derivatives Traders Are Shorting BTC With $2.07B on the Line.
item.description: The S&P 500 cracked 7,000 this week on stronger-than-expected earnings — and Trump signaled Iran's war should end “pretty soon,” pushing oil lower. Macro is risk-on. BTC moved from $74K to $76,010 (+1.9% 24h). But on Hyperliquid, perpetual futures traders are building short positions int

item.title: DeFi Tokens +10–20% as BTC Flat-Lines at $74K — Classic High-Beta Rotation or a Trap?
item.description: BTC is flat at $74,787 while DeFi tokens are up 10–20% in 24 hours — a divergence happening directly against macro deterioration. Former Treasury Secretary Paulson this morning called for an emergency “break-the-glass” plan if Treasury demand collapses (“it will be vicious” —

item.title: Oil's Risk Premium Starts to Collapse as Ceasefire Signals Stack — S&P at ATH While BTC Flat-Lines at $74K
item.description: Two ceasefire signals landed in 24 hours: Trump said the Iran war “should” end soon, and Israel and Lebanon agreed to a 10-day truce (via CNBC). Oil fell and the S&P 500 closed at an all-time high. The risk premium that has kept oil elevated since the conflict escalated is starting to co

item.title: Gold & Silver Perps Showdown: ARX vs trade.xyz (2026)
item.description: Gold & silver perps showdown: ARX vs trade.xyz in 2026. Spread, funding, volume, and execution compared on the two biggest on-chain precious metals venues.

item.title: Trump Threatens to Fire Powell, CLARITY Act Closing In — BTC at $75K as Whales Distribute
item.description: Two catalysts hit within 24 hours: Trump threatened to fire Fed Chair Powell (dollar debasement signal), and JPMorgan says the US CLARITY Act is in its final stage (institutional adoption unlock). BTC climbed to $74,641 (+0.88%). But CryptoQuant shows January-rally holders are now at breakeven in th

item.title: Nasdaq Up 11 Straight. Crypto Perp Traders Are Doubling Down on Shorts.
item.description: The Nasdaq has recovered sharply — 11 consecutive up sessions off the early-April lows, with the S&P 500 back at multi-week highs. Crypto isn't following. BTC sits at $74,574, barely changed (+0.11% in 24h), capped below the $75K level. ETH perpetual funding sits at −0.0024% per 8h (≈ &m

item.title: Gold Hit $5,500: Why Are Traders Moving On-Chain in 2026?
item.description: Gold just hit $5,500 ATH. Why are sophisticated traders moving from COMEX futures to on-chain gold perps? The 2026 migration, numbers, and mechanics.

item.title: Goldman Files Bitcoin Income ETF — $291M Exits Spot Funds the Same Day, BTC Doesn't Care
item.description: Goldman Sachs filed for a Bitcoin income ETF on April 14, generating yield by selling options on bitcoin-linked funds — following BlackRock's push into similar yield-focused products. On the same day, US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $291M in outflows, the largest single-day redemption since March 27. Despi

item.title: Central Banks Selling Gold Into the War Rally — Oil at $98 as Iran Deal Takes Shape. Two Long Trades Breaking.
item.description: Reports of EM central bank selling are emerging in the gold market — a reversal from three years of net buying. Meanwhile, US-Iran peace talks are gaining traction, pulling crude from ~$105 to $98 as the risk of Strait of Hormuz supply disruption eases. BTC holds above $74,590 with spot ETF inflows

item.title: Oil Perps Hit $2.4B: How to Trade the Hormuz Crisis (2026)
item.description: Oil perps just hit $2.4B daily volume on Hyperliquid. How to trade the Hormuz crisis on-chain: setup, risk, and the 3 key price levels to watch.

item.title: Iran Ceasefire Hopes Lift Markets — But HL Whales Aren't Buying It
item.description: Iran deal optimism sent BTC +4.75% to $74,386 and ETH +7.65% today, with S&P 500 and Nasdaq also rallying. TradFi institutions are net buyers on SPY. But Hyperliquid's top wallets haven't flipped — they were still net short $76.7M as of Apr 11. Either the whales get squeezed, or the rally fades.

item.title: BTC rallies 5% to $74K — but Hyperliquid whales are still net short $77M
item.description: Bitcoin surged +4.75% to $74,386 with ETH up 7.65% and HYPE up 7.69%. VIX collapsed from 30.61 to 19.12 (‑37.5% panic decay). But Hyperliquid S-tier wallets — the top 676 accounts by PnL — haven't flipped.

item.title: Gold Perps OI Surges Past $180M as Hormuz Tensions Escalate — Funding Stays Flat
item.description: Hyperliquid GOLD OI jumped to $182.3M with $41M daily volume, driven by Strait of Hormuz naval buildup headlines. But here's what the data says: funding rate is just 0.002%/8h — essentially zero. Longs aren't paying a premium despite the fear narrative.

item.title: ETH Funding Flips Negative for First Time in 3 Weeks — Shorts Paying Longs
item.description: ETH 8h funding rate turned -0.0042% on Hyperliquid, the first negative print since March 22. This means shorts are now paying longs to hold — a structural shift in positioning.
